title: Side Shield Made by Mrbooyaa
description: Makes Your Shield Orange and side shield
body: A clean shield-focused PvP texture pack for Minecraft 1.21.11 that only changes the shield visuals, animations, and models. This pack keeps the rest of the game completely vanilla while giving your shield a smoother, more stylish look for PvP and crystal combat. Perfect for players who want custom shield animations without changing swords, armor, GUI, or other textures.
